args: set -e; export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; if [ ! -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ]; then echo "nvm not found at $NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" >&2; exit 127; fi; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use --silent 24 >/dev/null; exec npx -y @playwright/mcp

set -e; export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; if [ ! -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ]; then echo "nvm not found at $NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" >&2; exit 127; fi; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use --silent 24 >/dev/null; exec npx -y --ignore-scripts --min-release-age=2 @wordpress/design-system-mcp@latest
